explanations.2: clsx is a utility function that combines CSS class names together, letting you conditionally include classes based on logic.
explanations.3: useBlogPost is a custom hook (a reusable function) from Docusaurus that gives you information about the current blog post you're viewing.
explanations.10: isBlogPostPage is a boolean value (true or false) that tells you whether the user is viewing a single full blog post or a list of multiple posts.
explanations.11: This returns a margin class name only if we're NOT on a single post page; if we are on a single post page, it returns undefined (no extra spacing needed).
